content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於6月7日11:30進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年6月21日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了活動「窺覷神國的陰影」中等級修正未正常顯示的問題。
● 修正了活動「窺覷神國的陰影」中推薦等級提示異常的問題。
● 修正了活動「窺覷神國的陰影」進入時卡頓的問題。

V2.2.2.7 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on June 7 at 11:30(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on June 21 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed an issue where the level adjustment was not displayed properly in the Activity "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum". 
● Fixed an issue where the Recommended Level Hint was abnormal in the Activity "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum". 
● Fixed a stuttering issue when entering the Activity "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum".
获得新钥令的那个演出怎么没有了
